# meetdelai.com — Elmer De Leon · DELAI

> AI consulting, fractional CTO, and full-build engagements for founders shipping AI-native products. Backed by a portfolio of six AI products I run in production: Found, Modus, BiTES, HostGPT, PAGE, Munchies. Based in South Florida.

DELAI is not a consulting firm — it's a portfolio of standalone AI products that share an intelligence layer (Found), a data layer (Supabase), and an infrastructure layer (Mastra agent runtime on Hostinger + EC2). The site is a React 19 SPA; for full content scrape `/llms-full.txt`.

## What I do

- **Build** — design, code, ship AI-native products end-to-end. Each product in the portfolio runs in production.
- **Advise** — fractional CTO and advisory engagements for founders building AI-native products. Senior operator perspective, not theory.
- **Operate** — DELAI owns and runs each product; we don't sell software-as-a-package, we own the experience.

## Portfolio

- **Found** — personal AI / intelligence layer for the portfolio. https://thefoundai.app
- **Modus** — operator AI; productized engines for SMBs ($2.5k setup + $500/mo). https://modus-chi.vercel.app
- **BiTES** — AI food tracker; plate-photo nutrition, AI coach, restaurant menu scanning. Live on iOS + Android.
- **HostGPT** — AI host for short-term rental properties. Voice + chat + ops. https://myhostgpt.com
- **PAGE** — Stripe Connect Express acceptance for micro-merchants. https://meetpage.app
- **Munchies** — WhatsApp-first food delivery, Uber Direct certified. https://munchies.pr

## How to work with me

- Email: hello@meetdelai.com
- Form: https://meetdelai.com/?contact=1
- I take a small number of engagements at a time.
